analysis_commentary: Only 1 candidate probe captured (at t=508s) despite 334 training steps and a normal arena — candidate_test probing appears to have been mostly disabled this run. That single probe shows full collapse (max=1.0, illegal=1.0, value=0.9999). Same terminal state as baseline. top1_legal briefly positive; grad norm 85 (under alarm). Insufficient probe data to assess trajectory differences vs baseline.
